summary: iOS 👀 Free60+/20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image missing from Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen when Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20 is paired
description_clean: Headset image is missing from the Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen when a Poly Voyager Free 60+ or Poly Voyager Free 20 is paired. No placeholder image is displayed either. Expected: The headset image should appear on the Home Screen.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure no device is currently connected or paired.
Pair a Poly Voyager Free 60+ or Poly Voyager Free 20 headset via Bluetooth.
Observe the Home Screen of the app after pairing is complete.
expected: The headset image for the Poly Voyager Free 60+ or Poly Voyager Free 20 should appear on the Home Screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
actual: The headset image is missing from the Home Screen. No placeholder image is displayed either.
